confirm.title: COMPLETE MEETING
confirm.unlock_desc: You can complete the meeting in
confirm.note_desc: After completing the meeting, you will be redirected to a 10-question feedback form to share your experience.

promise.title: COMMITMENT MADE
promise.desc: Thank you for confirming! Your meeting has been recorded.
promise.next_step_desc: After the meeting, you can rate and send feedback to Clique83 after <1>30 minutes</1> from the start time.

thank_you.title: THANK YOU!
thank_you.desc: Your feedback helps Clique83 improve matching quality and provide a better experience.
